con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="TicketServiceImplService" targetNamespace="http://service.cinematicketsoap.cinema.soap.org/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://service.cinematicketsoap.cinema.soap.org/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://service.cinematicketsoap.cinema.soap.org/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="CancelReservation" type="tns:CancelReservation"/> <xs:element name="CancelReservationResponse" type="tns:CancelReservationResponse"/> <xs:element name="GetMovies" type="tns:GetMovies"/> <xs:element name="GetMoviesResponse" type="tns:GetMoviesResponse"/> <xs:element name="GetReservation" type="tns:GetReservation"/> <xs:element name="GetReservationResponse" type="tns:GetReservationResponse"/> <xs:element name="GetShowTimes" type="tns:GetShowTimes"/> <xs:element name="GetShowTimesResponse" type="tns:GetShowTimesResponse"/> <xs:element name="ReserveSeat" type="tns:ReserveSeat"/> <xs:element name="ReserveSeatResponse" type="tns:ReserveSeatResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="GetMovies"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="GetMoviesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:MovieList"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="MovieList"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="Movie" type="tns:Movie"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Movie"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="movieId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="title" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="genre" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="duration" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="GetShowTimes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="movieId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="GetShowTimesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:ShowTimeList"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ShowTimeList"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="ShowTimes" type="tns:ShowTime"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ShowTime"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="showTimeId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="movieId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="time" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="GetReservation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="reservationId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="GetReservationResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:Reservation"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Reservation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="reservationId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="movieId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="showTimeId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="seatNumber" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="customerName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="status" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="NoReservationFoundFault"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="message" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CancelReservation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="reservationId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CancelReservationResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:ReservationResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ReservationResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="reservationId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="status" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ReserveSeat"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="movieId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="showTimeId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="seatNumber" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="customerName" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ReserveSeatResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:ReservationResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="NoReservationFoundFault" nillable="true" type="tns:NoReservationFoundFault"/> <xs:element name="DuplicateReservationFault" type="tns:DuplicateReservationFault"/> <xs:complexType name="DuplicateReservationFault"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="message" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="DuplicateReservationException"> <wsdl:part element="tns:DuplicateReservationFault" name="DuplicateReservationException"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetShowTimesResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetShowTimesResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="CancelReservation"> <wsdl:part element="tns:CancelReservation" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ReserveSeatResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:ReserveSeatResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetMoviesResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetMoviesResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ReserveSeat"> <wsdl:part element="tns:ReserveSeat" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetMovies"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetMovies" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetShowTimes"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetShowTimes" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetReservation"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetReservation" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetReservationResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:GetReservationResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="CancelReservationResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:CancelReservationResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="NoReservationFound"> <wsdl:part element="tns:NoReservationFoundFault" name="NoReservationFound"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="TicketService"> <wsdl:operation name="GetMovies"> <wsdl:input message="tns:GetMovies" name="GetMovies"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:GetMoviesResponse" name="GetMoviesResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetShowTimes"> <wsdl:input message="tns:GetShowTimes" name="GetShowTimes"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:GetShowTimesResponse" name="GetShowTimesResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetReservation"> <wsdl:input message="tns:GetReservation" name="GetReservation"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:GetReservationResponse" name="GetReservationResponse"></wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault message="tns:NoReservationFound" name="NoReservationFound"></wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="CancelReservation"> <wsdl:input message="tns:CancelReservation" name="CancelReservation"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:CancelReservationResponse" name="CancelReservationResponse"></wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault message="tns:NoReservationFound" name="NoReservationFound"></wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="ReserveSeat"> <wsdl:input message="tns:ReserveSeat" name="ReserveSeat"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:ReserveSeatResponse" name="ReserveSeatResponse"></wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault message="tns:DuplicateReservationException" name="DuplicateReservationException"></wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="TicketServiceImplServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:TicketService"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="GetMovies"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetMovies"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetMoviesResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetShowTimes"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetShowTimes"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetShowTimesResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetReservation"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetReservation"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetReservationResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="NoReservationFound"> <soap:fault name="NoReservationFound" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="CancelReservation"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="CancelReservation"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="CancelReservationResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="NoReservationFound"> <soap:fault name="NoReservationFound" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="ReserveSeat"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="ReserveSeat"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="ReserveSeatResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="DuplicateReservationException"> <soap:fault name="DuplicateReservationException" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="TicketServiceImplService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:TicketServiceImplServiceSoapBinding" name="TicketServiceImplPort"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/soap-api/ticket"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
